title: 信息日报 2026-06-28

headline.title: OpenAI 预览 GPT-5.6 Sol：下一代模型到来
headline.summary: OpenAI 预览 GPT-5.6 Sol，这是其下一代模型，在编程、科学和网络安全方面能力更强，并配备最先进的安全堆栈。但白宫要求放缓发布，仅限部分合作伙伴使用。
headline.title_en: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
headline.summary_en: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-gen model with stronger capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity, paired with its most advanced safety stack. The White House requested limited rollout, restricting initial access to select partners.
headline.original_title: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
headline.reason: OpenAI 新模型发布是科技界最重磅消息，且涉及政府干预 AI 安全治理，地缘政治影响深远，是今日最具新闻价值的头条。
headline.reason_en: OpenAI's new model launch is the biggest tech news, involving government intervention in AI safety governance with far-reaching geopolitical implications, making it the most newsworthy lead today.
